name: MARA Holdings, Inc.
sandbox_note: Discovery-first IR scraper walks ir.mara.com listing pagination to discover historical mining-related PR pages instead of relying on guessed monthly URLs. ir.mara.com must be added to settings.json networkAllowList.

name: Riot Platforms, Inc.
sandbox_note: Discovery-first IR scraper uses RIOT's historical WordPress archive pages rather than the shell IR landing page. BusinessWire RSS returns 0 results as of 2026-03. Final monthly production update was December 2025 (switched to quarterly reporting).

name: CleanSpark, Inc.
sandbox_note: CleanSpark IR is currently protected by a Cloudflare challengeprnewswire.com/news/cleanspark%2C%20inc./

name: Core Scientific, Inc.
sandbox_note: Listing page at investors.corescientific.com is server-rendered; plain ?page=N requests return distinct HTML pages (confirmed 2026-03-16). Playwright not required for listing. Detail pages also served via plain HTTP. Discovery walks ?page=N pagination. Pre-bankruptcy coverage is irregular and should be boundary-checked from 2022 onward. CIK 0001839341 verified against EDGAR (Core Scientific, Inc./tx). Old CIK 0001836012 was WDC Fund 1 LLC (wrong).

name: Cipher Digital Inc.
sandbox_note: Rebranded from Cipher Mining Inc. to Cipher Digital Inc. in early 2026. IR domain migrated from investors.ciphermining.com to investors.cipherdigital.com. Monthly operational updates began December 2022 (released January 2023). Drupal-based site with year filter widget. CIK 0001819989 verified against EDGAR (Cipher Digital Inc., ticker CIFR). Old CIK 0001836028 was Florida Oil & Gas Alternative Fund LLC (wrong).

name: TeraWulf Inc.
sandbox_note: Listing page at investors.terawulf.com is server-rendered; plain ?page=N requests return distinct HTML pages (confirmed 2026-03-16). Playwright not required. Monthly production reports continued past September 2024 (October and December 2024 confirmed live). CIK 0001083301 verified against EDGAR (TERAWULF INC., ticker WULF). This is a legacy shell CIK (formerly IKONICS CORP / CHROMALINE CORP) reused via reverse merger Dec 2021. TeraWulf began mining operations at Lake Mariner facility December 2021; first full-month production PRs begin early 2022.

name: Hut 8 Corp.
sandbox_note: Hut 8 Corp is the US-incorporated entity formed from the November 2023 merger of Hut 8 Mining Corp (Canada) and US Bitcoin Corp (USBTC). Ticker changed from HUT8 to HUT at that time. CIK 0001964789 verified against EDGAR (Hut 8 Corp., ticker HUT, DE incorporated). Old entity Hut 8 Mining Corp is CIK 0001731805 (Canadian, deregistered Dec 2023, no ticker). Monthly production PRs available via PRNewswire (https://www.prnewswire.com/news/hut-8-corp./) but no RSS feed confirmed.

name: American Bitcoin Corp.
sandbox_note: CIK 0001755953 verified against EDGAR (American Bitcoin Corp., ticker ABTC, DE). SIC 6199. Formed early 2025 as partnership between Hut 8 Corp and Eric/Donald Trump Jr. Mining operations on Hut 8 US infrastructure.

name: IREN Limited
sandbox_note: CIK 0001878848 verified against EDGAR (IREN Ltd, ticker IREN). Formerly Iris Energy Limited (rebranded to IREN in 2024). Australian company listed on Nasdaq as foreign private issuer. Fiscal year ends June 30. Files 20-F (annual) and 6-K (current reports) with SEC. IR page has returned 502 intermittently (2026-03). Old CIK 0001871135 was MOBILE PORTFOLIO H LLC (wrong).

name: Bit Digital, Inc.
sandbox_note: CIK 0001710350 verified against EDGAR (Bit Digital, Inc, ticker BTBT). Cayman Islands holding company, operations primarily in North America and Iceland. Monthly BTC production updates filed as 6-K with SEC. Formerly ZW Data Action Technologies; pivoted to BTC mining 2020.

name: Bitdeer Technologies Group
sandbox_note: Drupal year-filter widget at ir.bitdeer.com. Site is Cloudflare-protected: plain requests timeout, Playwright returns HTTP/2 protocol error. curl-cffi with impersonate=chrome124 works (HTTP 200). Both ir.bitdeer.com and fallback domain bitdeer.gcs-web.com are in _CURL_CFFI_DOMAINS. Article detail URLs migrated to /news-releases/news-release-details/{slug} (confirmed 2026-03-16; old pattern /news-events/news-releases/detail/{id}/{slug} is stale). Confirmed production PRs 2023-2026. GlobeNewswire org search: https://www.globenewswire.com/search/organization/Bitdeer%20Technologies%20Group

name: BitFuFu Inc.
sandbox_note: CIK 0001921158 verified against EDGAR (Bitfufu Inc., tickers FUFU/FUFUW). Cayman Islands holding company; Singapore-based BTC mining and cloud mining services company. Listed on Nasdaq via SPAC (Arisz Acquisition Corp) in 2024. Bitmain affiliate. GlobeNewswire org search URL for reference. Old CIK 0001850838 was Omega Therapeutics Inc (wrong).

name: Cango Inc.
sandbox_note: CIK 0001725123 verified against EDGAR (Cango Inc., ticker CANG). Cayman Islands holding company; formerly a Chinese auto financing platform. Sold auto financing business and pivoted to BTC self-mining in late 2024. Limited mining history; BTC production data begins approximately Q4 2024. Old CIK 0001726445 was Seer Inc (wrong).

name: Bitfarms Ltd.
sandbox_note: IR site migrated from bitfarms.com/investors/ to investor.bitfarms.com. Drupal year-filter widget; years 2018-2026 available; listing HTML renders server-side so Drupal form tokens are present in initial curl-cffi response. Article detail URLs migrated to /news-releases/news-release-details/{slug} (confirmed 2026-03-16; old pattern /news-events/press-releases/detail/{id}/{slug} is stale). Company announced US redomiciliation and rebranding to 'Keel Infrastructure' (Feb 2026) -- IR domain may change again. GlobeNewswire org search: https://www.globenewswire.com/search/organization/Bitfarms%20Ltd

name: HIVE Digital Technologies Ltd.
sandbox_note: CIK 0001720424 verified against EDGAR (HIVE Digital Technologies Ltd., ticker HIVE). IR page at /news/ is a single unpaginated listing. Hrefs are relative without leading slash (e.g. hive-digital-technologies-provides-august-2025-...), resolved via urljoin(page_url, href). Period inferred from URL slug when title lacks adjacent year. HTTP 200 with plain requests. Formerly HIVE Blockchain Technologies; rebranded to HIVE Digital in 2023. Files 40-F (annual) and 6-K (current reports) with SEC.
